response.global_analysis:

subtitles.original: They are Justice.
subtitles.english: They are Justice.

subtitles.original: They make loads of trouble.
subtitles.english: They make loads of trouble.

subtitles.original: What?
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: Oh! Is that it?
subtitles.english: Oh! Is that it?

subtitles.original: Justice! Justice!
subtitles.english: Justice! Justice!

subtitles.original: Justice! Justice!
subtitles.english: Justice! Justice!

subtitles.original: How to Protect JUSTICE!
subtitles.english: How to Protect JUSTICE!

subtitles.original: Members of JUSTICE! are expected to possess strength,
subtitles.english: Members of JUSTICE! are expected to possess strength,

subtitles.original: sound judgment,
subtitles.english: sound judgment,

subtitles.original: and an unwavering sense of justice.
subtitles.english: and an unwavering sense of justice.

subtitles.original: In this training video,
subtitles.english: In this training video,

subtitles.original: you will learn the fundamental skills and exercises required of every Justice member.
subtitles.english: you will learn the fundamental skills and exercises required of every Justice member.

subtitles.original: Now, join us and say it together!
subtitles.english: Now, join us and say it together!

subtitles.original: FOR JUSTICE!
subtitles.english: FOR JUSTICE!

subtitles.original: [身体検査訓練]
subtitles.english: [Body Search Training]

subtitles.original: The first training is a body search conducted immediately after securing a subject.
subtitles.english: The first training is a body search conducted immediately after securing a subject.

subtitles.original: Even the slightest oversight can lead to serious incidents or the destruction of evidence,
subtitles.english: Even the slightest oversight can lead to serious incidents or the destruction of evidence,

subtitles.original: making this one of the most critical police procedures.
subtitles.english: making this one of the most critical police procedures.

subtitles.original: Can Justice keep their emotions in check under any circumstances
subtitles.english: Can Justice keep their emotions in check under any circumstances

subtitles.original: and carry out a precise body search to completion?
subtitles.english: and carry out a precise body search to completion?

subtitles.original: [Officer: Elizabeth / Suspect: Raora]
subtitles.english: [Officer: Elizabeth / Suspect: Raora]

subtitles.original: Stop, ma'am! No further, no further. It is...
subtitles.english: Stop, ma'am! No further, no further. It is...

subtitles.original: ...policy, and I'll be conducting a body search.
subtitles.english: ...policy, and I'll be conducting a body search.

subtitles.original: Come here, madam. Yes, body search you here.
subtitles.english: Come here, madam. Yes, body search you here.

subtitles.original: If you really insist...
subtitles.english: If you really insist...

subtitles.original: Over here, over here, over here, ma'am.
subtitles.english: Over here, over here, over here, ma'am.

subtitles.original: Okay, okay!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay!

subtitles.original: Do you have any electronics, tablets, laptops, devices?
subtitles.english: Do you have any electronics, tablets, laptops, devices?

subtitles.original: Turn around here, ma'am.
subtitles.english: Turn around here, ma'am.

subtitles.original: Arms up! All right.
subtitles.english: Arms up! All right.

subtitles.original: Straight arms, there we go. Wonderful, wonderful. All right.
subtitles.english: Straight arms, there we go. Wonderful, wonderful. All right.

subtitles.original: What is this?
subtitles.english: What is this?

subtitles.original: Oh... You know, Totini is... See, my Totini...
subtitles.english: Oh... You know, Totini is... See, my Totini...

subtitles.original: ...they are always hungry and they really want some food, so sometimes I always have...
subtitles.english: ...they are always hungry and they really want some food, so sometimes I always have...

subtitles.original: ...an emergency cucumber.
subtitles.english: ...an emergency cucumber.

subtitles.original: Emergency rations, I see, I see, I see. We can't have that on these premises, I'm sorry.
subtitles.english: Emergency rations, I see, I see, I see. We can't have that on these premises, I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: No? I... I take care of them.
subtitles.english: No? I... I take care of them.

subtitles.original: All right. Spread your legs, ma'am, over here.
subtitles.english: All right. Spread your legs, ma'am, over here.

subtitles.original: No, no!
subtitles.english: No, no!

subtitles.original: Over here, ma'am. Over here, right here.
subtitles.english: Over here, ma'am. Over here, right here.

subtitles.original: What are you going to do if I don't do it?
subtitles.english: What are you going to do if I don't do it?

subtitles.original: Uh, probably arrest you, put you in jail for many years...
subtitles.english: Uh, probably arrest you, put you in jail for many years...

subtitles.original: ...take you to court.
subtitles.english: ...take you to court.

subtitles.original: Really? You're going to arrest me? What are you going to do?
subtitles.english: Really? You're going to arrest me? What are you going to do?

subtitles.original: Oh! What if I... What if I check on you instead?
subtitles.english: Oh! What if I... What if I check on you instead?

subtitles.original: No, no. It's my job, ma'am. My job. Over here, ma'am.
subtitles.english: No, no. It's my job, ma'am. My job. Over here, ma'am.

subtitles.original: All right, stand there. What is...
subtitles.english: All right, stand there. What is...

subtitles.original: ...this?
subtitles.english: ...this?

subtitles.original: Oh... I like cooking.
subtitles.english: Oh... I like cooking.

subtitles.english: Would you like something? Maybe I can cook something for you?

subtitles.original: Ma'am, I'm a professional. No dating on the job.
subtitles.english: Ma'am, I'm a professional. No dating on the job.

subtitles.english: Do you want a little bit of pasta? I'm so good at making pasta.

subtitles.original: Pasta... I am a bit hungry.
subtitles.english: Pasta... I am a bit hungry.

subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey! Stop trying to tempt me! Stop trying to tempt me!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay!

subtitles.original: All right. Stand here.
subtitles.english: All right. Stand here.

subtitles.original: Stand here, ma'am! Right here now!
subtitles.english: Stand here, ma'am! Right here now!

subtitles.original: She's kind of hot when she's...
subtitles.english: She's kind of hot when she's...

subtitles.english: Three, two, one, arms out!

subtitles.english: ...this?

subtitles.original: Oh... That's a...
subtitles.english: Oh... That's a...

subtitles.english: That's a Totini jetpack!

subtitles.original: Oh, no one should see this. Let's get out of here.
subtitles.english: Oh, no one should see this. Let's get out of here.

subtitles.original: Ma'am! You just threw that small... little creature!
subtitles.english: Ma'am! You just threw that small... little creature!

subtitles.original: Don't worry about it!
subtitles.english: Don't worry about it!

subtitles.original: All right, anyway, what is this?
subtitles.english: All right, anyway, what is this?

subtitles.original: Oh... Well...
subtitles.english: Oh... Well...

subtitles.original: You have a lot of food-related items on you, ma'am.
subtitles.english: You have a lot of food-related items on you, ma'am.

subtitles.original: Yes, please, please eat that before you go.
subtitles.english: Yes, please, please eat that before you go.

subtitles.english: Do you want a little bit, too?

subtitles.original: No, ma'am, I'm on the job! I'm on the job!
subtitles.english: No, ma'am, I'm on the job! I'm on the job!

subtitles.original: Anyway, ma'am, arms up! Come here, come here, over here.
subtitles.english: Anyway, ma'am, arms up! Come here, come here, over here.

subtitles.english: What are you going to do if I don't do it? Are you going to punish me or something?

subtitles.original: No! Not this one!

subtitles.english: All right, and what is... anatomy book... I can explain!

subtitles.english: And also for having... Really?

subtitles.original: ...having Totinis with jetpacks! That is unbelievable!
subtitles.english: ...having Totinis with jetpacks! That is unbelievable!

subtitles.original: You are a bad, bad kitty! You are a bad kitty! Come here!
subtitles.english: You are a bad, bad kitty! You are a bad kitty! Come here!

subtitles.english: All right, you are under arrest! Oh, yes I am!

subtitles.english: Are we going to jail? Are you going to bring me to jail?

subtitles.english: Maybe we can share a cell together? Raora, no!
